title: The Young Lady's Fool
writer: Giannis Dalianidis, Nikos Tsiforos, Polyvios Vasileiadis
actors: Jenny Karezi, Dinos Iliopoulos, Dionysis Papagiannopoulos
plot: Entranced by the whimsical but spoiled young daughter of his boss, an honest but poor office accountant will find himself entangled in a seemingly fail-proof scheme behind his back. But who has the last word?
